title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind presents Deep research API, powered by Gemini, enabling agents that enhance performance on comprehensive research tasks. The session demonstrates how to implement these agent-based techniques using Google Cloud infrastructure.
writeup: The session covers Deep research API from Google DeepMind, powered by Gemini, which enables agents built for comprehensive research tasks. It demonstrates how to implement these agent-based techniques on Google Cloud infrastructure. The takeaway is a concrete path for deploying Gemini-driven research agents using Google Cloud, with the API positioned as the means to improve performance on broad research workloads.
